creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text: The geckos haven't used python 2.7 for ages. Also, firefox-esr builds just fine and does not reference the old python at all: http://beefy2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/123amd64-quarterly/8f70a2b730bc/logs/firefox-esr-102.6.0,1.log . When comparing that to your log, I'd say your python acts funny.
